cause: The old cheek and jaw anchors used extrema of MPFB cheek-bone and chin-width control regions, while the manual target points are full visible facial-contour extrema. This made every candidate jaw wider than its cheek metric and could reward increased taper contrary to the target ratio and visible diagnosis.
affectedArtifacts: All macro-geometry.json receipts and selection.json under this run remain preserved but may not support nomination or promotion.
recovery: Use full non-ear head-surface contour extrema in target-matched normalized cheek/jaw bands and stable maximum-signed-displacement mouth corners under a new immutable run identity.
